articles.title: How Chainlink will help secure Polkadot’s environment
articles.description: Polkadot has integrated with Chainlink to incorporate its oracle service into its multi-chain environment. articles.title: XRP lawsuit update: Ripple gets its motion to seal approved
articles.description: Ripple has been fighting the lawsuit filed by the United States’ Securities and Exchange Commission [SEC] for a while now.
